UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENG, QIN YI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TLC RESIDENTIAL, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 306 STRATFORD DRIVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENG, QIN YI SERVED JAN-30-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT TLC RESIDENTIAL, INC.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TLC RESIDENTIAL, INC.
